so.example_en: It is raining, so we stay indoors.
so.example_zh: 下雨了，所以我们待在室内。

or.example_en: Do you want tea or coffee?

not.example_en: He does not eat meat on Mondays.

we.example_en: We go to school every day.

upon.example_en: She puts the book upon the desk.

wang.example_en: Wang is a common Chinese name.
wang.example_zh: 王是一个常见的中文姓氏。

tiny.example_en: This ant is tiny but strong.
tiny.example_zh: 这只蚂蚁极小却很强壮。

any (other).example_en: Do you have any other questions?
